html:for-each.declare: <DATOS oi_empresa="1" per_desde="201101" per_hasta="201112" oi_variable="" oi_personal_emp="" c_variable="aa_totsret" l_incluir="" />

GROUP.noreg: No se encontraron datos para los filtros ingresados.

qry:select.name: sql0
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT ORG03_EMPRESAS.d_empresa FROM ORG03_EMPRESAS WHERE ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo FROM PER01_PERSONAL, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAMIN:@ids%}) ORDER BY e_numero_legajo asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable FROM LIQ09_VARIABLES WHERE LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'9\' {%? (#PARAMIN:@c_variable!='') {% AND CONTAIN(LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, \'{%=#PARAMIN:@c_variable%}\') %} {% %} %} {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_variable!='') {% AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable = {#PARAMIN:@oi_variable} %} {% %} %} ORDER BY c_variable asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql6
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_personal_emp, LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable, LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.e_periodo, LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.n_valor FROM LIQ07_VAL_VARPA, LIQ09_VARIABLES JOIN LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_variable INNER LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable WHERE LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_tipo_variable = \'9\' AND LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.e_periodo >= {#PARAMIN:@per_desde} AND LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.e_periodo <= {#PARAMIN:@per_hasta} AND LIQ07_VAL_VARPA.oi_personal_emp IN ({%=#PARAMIN:@ids%}) {%? (#PARAMIN:@c_variable!='') {% AND CONTAIN(LIQ09_VARIABLES.c_variable, \'{%=#PARAMIN:@c_variable%}\') %} {% %} %} {%? (#PARAMIN:@oi_variable!='') {% AND LIQ09_VARIABLES.oi_variable = {#PARAMIN:@oi_variable} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW
